name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the monitor, setup flow, or deployment model
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What operator or contributor problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Constraints

Call out any constraints around privacy, low-power devices, network exposure, or deployment portability.

## Alternatives Considered

List other options you considered, if any.
